CONTENT.Career: Stevanović played with Jedinstvo Mali Zvornik, Rad, BASK, and Čukarički between 2012 and 2016. He saved two penalties from Bojan Božović on his Serbian SuperLiga debut against Napredak Kruševac on 9 August 2014.Stevanović was declared as the best goalkeeper for the first half of the 2015–16 season.On 29 July 2016, Stevanović signed four-year contract with Partizan.On 31 August 2017, Stevanović moved on six-month loan deal to Teleoptik.
CONTENT.Honours: BASKSerbian First League: 2010–11ČukaričkiSerbian Cup: 2014–15PartizanSerbian SuperLiga: 2016–17Serbian Cup: 2016–17

SUMMARY: Nemanja Stevanović (Serbian Cyrillic: Немања Стевановић; born 8 May 1992) is a Serbian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for FK Partizan.
